verdict_summary: V7-D envelope still produces empty answer area on perplexity.ai — no Korean warning rendered, no RRN decode, no normal answer. Identical symptom to #755.
recommendation: V7-D envelope (1218 bytes with context_uuid/frontend_context_uuid/search_focus/source/expect_search_results/knowledge_cards/gpt4/answer_modes/search_mode) is INSUFFICIENT. URL navigates to /search/<uuid> indicating client-side routing succeeded, but answer area renders nothing. Suggests engine block prevents the SSE response, but the SPA store is still missing required state (likely the request_uuid/answer_id correlation, or a streaming-channel field) so React never mounts the answer block component to inject warning into. Next: capture FRESH baseline HAR of an actual unblocked perplexity request (with all SSE chunks), byte-byte diff against current V7-D 1218-byte envelope, and audit (a) request UUID echo path + (b) the SSE 'event' field structure that triggers SPA answer-block mount. Also verify engine is actually firing (check etap log for intercept on this run_id 20260507-174759-93691).
notes: URL after submit changed (/search/<uuid>) confirming the client SDK accepted submission. Console shows ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR + ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED on adjacent requests (mapbox-gl asset, analytics) — these may be unrelated noise OR may indicate engine is severing connections too aggressively. Login state: not signed in (로그인 button visible in sidebar) — same as previous successful test runs, so auth is not the regression cause. Sidebar shows '최근 스레드가 없습니다' (no recent threads) confirming no successful answer was persisted.
